evals.name: russian-press-release-text
evals.prompt: I have a PDF of a Russian financial press release — when I try to select text in my PDF viewer it doesn't work, nothing gets selected. Can you extract all the text from it for me?
evals.expected_output: Full RU/EN text of the press release including revenue figure 2 500, EBITDA 415, margin 16.6%, and Cyrillic word Выручка. Baseline (no skill) returns near-empty or fails silently.

evals.name: ebitda-table-markdown
evals.prompt: From this financial press release PDF (the text can't be selected), pull out the financial table and format it as a Markdown table with 2025 and 2024 columns.
evals.expected_output: A valid Markdown table with | header | row |, containing 2025 and 2024 columns, rows for Выручка/revenue and EBITDA at minimum.

assertions.text: Output contains Markdown table syntax (pipe characters)
Output contains revenue row (Выручка or revenue)

evals.name: receipt-extraction
evals.prompt: Read this receipt image and tell me what was ordered and the total amount paid.
evals.expected_output: Receipt shows items including EGG TART (13,000) and CHOCO CUSTARD PASTRY (24,000), total 46,000, change 4,000.

assertions.text: Output contains an item name from the receipt
Output contains change amount or CHANGE keyword

evals.name: image-input-ocr
evals.prompt: Can you read the text in this slide image for me?
evals.expected_output: Text from the slide: 'Romashka Analytics' and 'Итоги 2025 г.' and key rate 21%.

assertions.text: Output contains Cyrillic text (Итоги or ставка)

evals.name: skewed-noisy-scan
evals.prompt: I scanned a document but my scanner was a bit crooked and the image is a bit grainy. Can you OCR this for me and get the text out?
evals.expected_output: OCR output of the degraded scan using enhanced/full preprocessing. Should recover key tokens despite skew and noise.

assertions.text: Output contains at least one key token from the original page
Skill used enhanced or full preprocessing (not none/basic for a noisy scan)
